RemediationStrings.Title: AlwaysInstallElevated (Administrative Templates - Windows Installer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer\AlwaysInstallElevated must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows Installer.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableUserControl (Administrative Templates - Windows Installer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer\EnableUserControl must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows Installer.

RemediationStrings.Title: OnlyUseAXISForActiveXInstall (Administrative Templates - Windows Installer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\AxInstaller\OnlyUseAXISForActiveXInstall must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows Installer.
